class CfgVehicles {
    class All {};
    class AllVehicles : All {};
    class Land : AllVehicles {};
    
    class LandVehicle : Land {
        scope = 0;
        accuracy = 1.0;
        cost = 10000;
    };
    
    class Tank : LandVehicle {
        scope = 0;
        vehicleClass = "Armored";
        accuracy = 0.3;
        armor = 400;
        cost = 500000;
        maxSpeed = 60;
        terrainCoef = 1.5;
    };
    
    class SyntheticTankAlpha : Tank {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "Synthetic Tank Alpha";
        model = "\Synthetic\vehicles\m1abrams.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\vehicles\equip_m1abrams.paa";
        armor = 900;
        armorStructural = 6.0;
        maxSpeed = 65.5;
        turnSpeed = 0.8;
        crew = "SoldierWCrew";
        transportSoldier = 0;
        driverCanEject = 0;
        class Turret {
            gunnerAction = "M1Gunner";
            gunnerInAction = "M1GunnerIn";
            gunnerOpticsModel = "\Synthetic\optika_gunner_tank";
            gunnerForceOptics = 1;
            weapons[] = {"M256", "M240Coax"};
            magazines[] = {"M256_SABOT", "M256_SABOT", "M256_HEAT", "M256_HEAT", "M240_200Rnd", "M240_200Rnd", "M240_200Rnd"};
            soundServo[] = {"", 0.01, 1.0};
        };
        class Damage {
            tex[] = {};
            mat[] = {
                "Synthetic\vehicles\data\m1abrams.rvmat",
                "Synthetic\vehicles\data\m1abrams_damage.rvmat",
                "Synthetic\vehicles\data\m1abrams_destruct.rvmat"
            };
        };
    };
    
    class SyntheticTankBeta : Tank {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "T-72";
        model = "\Synthetic\vehicles\t72.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\vehicles\equip_t72.paa";
        side = 0;
        faction = "EAST";
        armor = 750;
        maxSpeed = 60;
        crew = "SoldierECrew";
        class Turret {
            gunnerAction = "SyntheticTankBetaGunner";
            weapons[] = {"2A46M", "PKT"};
            magazines[] = {"2A46M_APFSDS", "2A46M_APFSDS", "2A46M_HE", "PKT_200Rnd", "PKT_200Rnd"};
        };
    };
    
    class Car : LandVehicle {
        scope = 0;
        vehicleClass = "Car";
        accuracy = 0.5;
    };
    
    class Jeep : Car {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "M151A2 Jeep";
        model = "\Synthetic\vehicles\jeep.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\vehicles\equip_jeep.paa";
        crew = "SyntheticSoldierWest";
        transportSoldier = 3;
        side = 1;
        faction = "WEST";
    };
    
    class Truck : Car {
        scope = 0;
        transportSoldier = 12;
    };
    
    class M113 : Tank {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "M113";
        model = "\Synthetic\vehicles\m113.p3d";
        armor = 80;
        transportSoldier = 10;
        class Turret {
            weapons[] = {"M2"};
            magazines[] = {"M2_100Rnd", "M2_100Rnd"};
        };
    };
    
    class Air : AllVehicles {
        scope = 0;
        vehicleClass = "Air";
    };
    
    class Helicopter : Air {
        scope = 0;
        vehicleClass = "Air";
    };
    
    class AH1Z : Helicopter {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "AH-1Z Viper";
        model = "\Synthetic\air\ah1z.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\air\equip_ah1z.paa";
        side = 1;
        faction = "WEST";
        crew = "HelicopterPilotW";
        armor = 40;
        class Library {
            libTextDesc = "Attack helicopter armed with machine gun and rocket pods";
        };
        class Turrets {
            class MainTurret {
                gunnerAction = "AH1Gunner";
                weapons[] = {"M197", "FFARLauncher"};
                magazines[] = {"M197_750Rnd", "FFAR_19Rnd", "FFAR_19Rnd"};
            };
        };
    };
    
    class SyntheticHeli : Helicopter {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "Synthetic Utility Helicopter";
        model = "\Synthetic\air\complex_vehicle.p3d";
        side = 1;
        faction = "WEST";
        transportSoldier = 10;
        class Turrets {
            class LeftDoorGun {
                weapons[] = {"M134_minigun"};
                magazines[] = {"M134_3000Rnd"};
            };
            class RightDoorGun {
                weapons[] = {"M134_minigun"};
                magazines[] = {"M134_3000Rnd"};
            };
        };
    };
    
    class Man : Land {
        scope = 2;
        vehicleClass = "Men";
        displayName = "Soldier";
        model = "\Synthetic\soldiers\soldierWB.p3d";
        weapons[] = {};
        magazines[] = {};
        accuracy = 1.0;
    };
    
    class SyntheticSoldierWest : Man {
        displayName = "US Soldier";
        side = 1;
        faction = "WEST";
        weapons[] = {"SyntheticRifle", "Binocular", "Throw", "Put"};
        magazines[] = {"SyntheticMagazine", "SyntheticMagazine", "SyntheticMagazine", "SyntheticMagazine", "HandGrenade", "HandGrenade"};
    };
    
    class SyntheticSoldierEast : Man {
        displayName = "Soviet Soldier";
        side = 0;
        faction = "EAST";
        model = "\Synthetic\soldiers\soldierEB.p3d";
        weapons[] = {"AK74", "Throw", "Put"};
        magazines[] = {"AK74", "AK74", "AK74", "AK74", "HandGrenade"};
    };
};
